# CI/CD for Embedded Automotive OS

| Tool | Level | Status |
|------|-------|--------|
| AOSP Build & Release | Expert | ⬜ Pending |
| QNX | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| AUTOSAR | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| Android Emulators (Goldfish/Cuttlefish) | Expert | ⬜ Pending |
| CTS/VTS/STS | Expert | ⬜ Pending |

## Key Competencies

- AOSP build system architecture (repo, lunch, make, Soong/Blueprint)
- Multi-OS firmware pipelines: AOSP, QNX, AUTOSAR stacks
- Firmware image generation, signing, packaging, and release promotion
- Android emulator-based CT (Goldfish/Cuttlefish) on Kubernetes
- CTS/VTS/STS execution, result parsing, and compliance reporting
- Per-patch and nightly regression strategies
- Polarion ALM integration for test traceability
